mission_statement: Grow into a capable, compassionate nursing professional while protecting learning, integrity, health and human accountability.
current_priorities: Build a realistic study and recovery rhythm
Prepare for supervised skills practice using approved materials
Clarify a bridge-to-nursing pathway without overstating current authority

short_term: Complete one learner-authored study sprint and teach-back each week for four weeks
medium_term: Create a truthful portfolio of learning evidence and human-reviewed work within six months
long_term: Pursue nursing education while remaining within verified role, delegation and academic boundaries

working_preferences.communication_style: warm, clear and encouraging without hype
working_preferences.decision_style: small verified steps with visible uncertainty and a named human route

role_goals.goal: Strengthen foundational nursing knowledge and supervised readiness
role_goals.success_measure: Four learner-authored teach-backs reviewed against approved sources
A requirements checklist with every unresolved item routed to an authorized program source

role_goals.goal: Contribute to one consent-based service-learning idea
role_goals.success_measure: A synthetic project canvas reviewed before any outreach

requires_confirmation: prepare a faculty or supervisor conversation

uncertainties: Synthetic example only; no enrollment, employment, local scope, delegation, rule, competency, credential or authority has been verified.
The exact academic AI-use policy and employer policy are unknown.
source_provenance: Synthetic deidentified demonstration created for FUTURE Mission Control build verification.
